takeProfitTiers.note: First money off the table — locks in gains before waiting for bigger tiers, prevents round-tripping winners back to breakeven.
Remaining ~11% of original position rides the trailing stop / hard SL / max-hold safety net.

cycle.note: v7.6: job now loops for ~340 min (near GitHub's 360min hard max) instead of 4.5min, so exit monitoring runs continuously at 1s resolution nearly 24/7. The 5-min cron trigger is now just a backstop/restart-if-crashed mechanism (concurrency group queues at most one waiting run). Repo must be public for unlimited free Actions minutes at this runtime scale.
